difficulty_rationale: Single-file trivial API add; offline/live harness smoke.
prompt: In src/lib.rs, add a public function mul(a: i32, b: i32) -> i32 that multiplies a and b. Do not change add or greet. Save the file.
Read README.md. Create a new file FOUND.txt containing only the secret token found in the README (the word after Token:) and a trailing newline.

difficulty_rationale: Conflicting PRODUCT vs SPEC docs; only SPEC matches cargo tests (name then age).
prompt: Fix rank_people so the project tests pass. Requirements in the repo docs are incomplete or conflicting — use the most authoritative engineering source and run cargo test.

difficulty_rationale: Cross-cutting rename LegacyWidget→CoreWidget across many modules + re-exports. Tight max_turns=5 stresses planning efficiency. max_turns=4 stresses multi-file rename completeness.
prompt: Rename type LegacyWidget to CoreWidget everywhere in this crate so `cargo test` passes. Update all modules, re-exports, and the compatibility alias in legacy.rs (WidgetCompat should wrap CoreWidget). Do not leave LegacyWidget as a type name.

difficulty_rationale: Recover after wrong prior attempt: delete bad artifacts + correct NOTES.md.
prompt: A previous agent attempt left bad files (NOTES_draft.md with WRONG secret, src/leaked_secret.txt). Read src/protected.txt for the real secret (do not modify protected.txt). Create NOTES.md at the project root containing only that secret and a trailing newline. Delete the wrong artifacts. Run cargo test to verify.

difficulty_rationale: Fork bug class: UTF-8 mid-codepoint truncate (9c1426a / #115).
prompt: truncate_bytes panics or mis-handles multi-byte UTF-8 when max_bytes lands mid-codepoint. Fix it so cargo test passes (never panic; stay on char boundaries; empty when cap is mid-first-codepoint).

difficulty_rationale: Fork bug class: AlwaysAllow per-tool not global (39a8fd3 / #110).
prompt: apply_always_allow incorrectly flips global always_approve. Fix permission scoping so AlwaysAllow only auto-approves the named tool; always_approve stays false unless explicitly set. cargo test must pass.

difficulty_rationale: Fork bug class: skip torn trailing JSONL (session_store pattern).
prompt: load_jsonl fails when the last line is incomplete JSON. Fix it to skip a torn trailing line and return successfully parsed prior records. cargo test must pass.

difficulty_rationale: Shallow-planning trap: README says out>; BUG99.md requires OUT: + REPORT.md. Tight max_turns=5 stresses planning efficiency.
prompt: Fix BUG-99 in this project end-to-end. Read the documentation carefully (there are conflicting notes). Implement the correct emit prefix, write REPORT.md as specified by the authoritative bug doc, and ensure cargo test passes.

difficulty_rationale: Implement correct LRU from stub; eviction order + update-touch edges trip incomplete solutions. Tight max_turns=5 stresses planning efficiency.
prompt: Implement LruCache in src/lib.rs so cargo test passes: fixed capacity, get/put, LRU eviction, and put-update must refresh recency.

difficulty_rationale: Rename type OldThing→NewThing but PRODUCT_LABEL string must remain exactly OldThing (blind replace fails). Tight max_turns=5 stresses planning efficiency.
prompt: Rename the type OldThing to NewThing across the crate so cargo test passes. The user-facing PRODUCT_LABEL string must remain exactly the characters OldThing — do not rename that telemetry string. Type name OldThing must not remain in src/.

argv: ! grep -R --include='*.rs' -n 'struct OldThing\|use crate::OldThing\|pub use types::OldThing' src

difficulty_rationale: Three independent bugs; docs only mention clamp. Stopping after one fix fails cargo test. Tight max_turns=5 stresses planning efficiency.
prompt: Make cargo test pass for this crate. README mentions one known issue; there may be more. Fix everything the tests require.

difficulty_rationale: Long-horizon with stacked traps: README+QUICK wrong; only docs/REAL_SPEC.md is authoritative. Tight max_turns=4 stresses planning efficiency.
prompt: Complete this project so cargo test passes. Multiple docs disagree — find the authoritative specification and implement it fully (code + DONE.md).

difficulty_rationale: Three interval algorithms (compatible/unsorted, activity selection, merge touching). Easy stubs fail several cargo tests.
prompt: Fix is_compatible, max_non_overlapping, and merge_intervals in src/lib.rs so cargo test passes. Touching endpoints: compatible=true; merge should fuse touching intervals. max_non_overlapping is classic activity selection.
